metadata.title: Core Korean: Time and Greetings
metadata.source_description: Supplemental A1 vocab selected from coverage gaps

item.notes: Coverage gap: greetings. Core politeness formula used every day.
item.image_prompt: Polished illustration of a Korean adult receiving help and smiling gratefully in a contemporary city setting, no text in the image.

image.prompt: Polished illustration of a Korean adult receiving help and smiling gratefully in a contemporary city setting, no text in the image. Stylish, contemporary editorial illustration for an adult language learner in their 30s. Keep it warm, playful, and visually engaging without looking childish. Use clean composition, rich color, and a polished modern textbook feel. If the scene includes people, depict Korean people in a natural contemporary Korean setting. No text in the image.

cards.back_html:
thank you
감사합니다
gamsahamnida

Examples

  • 도움 주셔서 감사합니다.
    Thank you for your help.
Coverage gap: greetings. Core politeness formula used every day.
Source: New vocab proposal • coverage-gap • greetings

item.image_prompt: Polished illustration of Korean office workers walking to lunch in a city street at midday, no text in the image.

image.prompt: Polished illustration of Korean office workers walking to lunch in a city street at midday, no text in the image. Stylish, contemporary editorial illustration for an adult language learner in their 30s. Keep it warm, playful, and visually engaging without looking childish. Use clean composition, rich color, and a polished modern textbook feel. If the scene includes people, depict Korean people in a natural contemporary Korean setting. No text in the image.
